case_title: NATALYA ALEXEI VS. AURA SKIN SPA INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $85.00) SERVED DEC-01-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AURA SKIN SPA INC.
